hooks.command:
python -c "
import sys, json, re
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
except:
    sys.exit(0)
cmd = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
if 'git commit' not in cmd:
    sys.exit(0)
try:
    with open('docs/producto/PRODUCTO.md', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        content = f.read()
    m = re.search(r'\*\*Versi.n:\*\*\s*(\S+)', content)
    version = m.group(1) if m else 'desconocida'
    print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': f'VERSION ACTUAL: v{version} — Si este commit sube la version, recordá hacer: git tag v{version} && git push --tags'}))
except:
    pass
"

python -c "
import json, re, subprocess, os
msg_lines = ['--- CIERRE DE SESION LexCore ---', 'Antes de terminar, confirma:', '[ ] PRODUCTO.md actualizado con features completadas', '[ ] Daily creado en docs/sprints/sprint-XX/daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md', '[ ] Historias completadas -> estado done en BACKLOG.md']
try:
    with open('docs/producto/PRODUCTO.md', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        content = f.read()
    m = re.search(r'\*\*Versi.n:\*\*\s*(\S+)', content)
    version = m.group(1) if m else '?'
    try:
        tags = subprocess.check_output(['git', 'tag'], text=True).strip().split()
        tag = f'v{version}'
        if tag not in tags:
            msg_lines.append(f'[ ] git tag {tag} && git push --tags  (version {version} sin tag)')
        else:
            msg_lines.append(f'[x] Tag {tag} ya existe')
    except:
        msg_lines.append(f'[ ] Crear tag v{version} cuando commitees')
except:
    pass
print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': chr(10).join(msg_lines)}))
"
